meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Idea Block
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap with our Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly guide to building profitable SaaS using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use the Antigravity project template to rapidly scaffold and deploy functional SaaS MVPs. By leveraging Claude Code for iterative development, you can validate market demand in hours, not weeks. Focus on solving one narrow, high-value problem for a specific niche to ensure revenue potential.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the graveyard of ambition. You sit down, coffee in hand, ready to build the next unicorn, but the cursor blinks back at you with indifference. The 'no project ideas' paralysis isn't a lack of creativity; it's a lack of a framework for execution. Most founders get stuck because they try to invent the future rather than simply improving the present.

Antigravity changes the geometry of development. By using a pre-configured project template, you bypass the boilerplate hell that kills momentum. Combined with the raw reasoning power of Claude Code, you aren't just writing code—you are architecting a business. It’s time to move from infinite deliberation to relentless iteration.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-Niche
steps.description: Identify a specific workflow bottleneck for a niche audience (e.g., real estate agents, solo consultants). Focus on one task that currently takes them too long manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Generate a list of 5 hyper-specific, high-value micro-SaaS ideas that solve manual data entry problems for residential real estate agents.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research and document the top 3 pain points for residential real estate agents regarding lead management.'

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Template
steps.description: Scaffold your project foundation to ensure production-grade architecture from the first commit, focusing on authentication and database connectivity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project template focused on a Next.js 14 stack with Supabase integration and Stripe billing ready for production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template structure and configure the environment variables for Supabase and Stripe.'

steps.title: Build the MVP Core Feature
steps.description: Implement the single feature that solves your identified bottleneck. Do not add bells and whistles; focus on the 'Hair-on-Fire' problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the primary React component for the core lead-parsing engine, ensuring it accepts CSV uploads and maps them to the Supabase schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write the backend logic and frontend UI for the CSV lead-parsing feature defined in the project scope.'

steps.title: Configure Stripe Monetization
steps.description: Integrate billing immediately. If you aren't charging, you aren't building a business; you are building a hobby.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Stripe Checkout integration for a monthly subscription model within the existing Antigravity template structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate Stripe Checkout and create a webhook handler to update user subscription status in the database.'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Get your MVP live. Feedback is the only metric that matters, and it only happens once users can access your URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and prepare a deployment script for Vercel/Railway.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Audit the current codebase for security, finalize production environment config, and output the deployment steps.'

pro_tips: Always build for a 'hair-on-fire' problem; if they aren't complaining about it on Reddit, don't build it.
Use Claude Code as a pair programmer, not a ghostwriter—verify every database schema modification before committing.
Prioritize Stripe integration on day two; it forces you to define your value proposition clearly.
Don't build a custom UI library from scratch; use the Antigravity template's built-in component system to maintain velocity.
Kill features that take more than 4 hours to implement; if it's too complex for your MVP, it's a distraction.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, share the link in 3 relevant subreddits or LinkedIn groups. Collect feedback, iterate on the specific user complaints, and aim for your first 10 paying customers before adding any new features.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint, the tools, and the strategy to stop dreaming and start shipping. Every day you wait is a day a competitor is building your idea. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
